Lamburus fairlaunch

Ended
LambUrus is an upcoming crazy hyped meme coin on SOL. On a $50M marketcap we will be gifting a Lamborghini Urus to one of our coin holders. While others destroy we give! If you missed $POWSCHE $BOME $SLERF, don't miss $URUS for massive gains 📢 Ads & Trending on Crypto Websites (DEXscreener etc.) 💎 OG marketers that have a Multi-Million $ in Portfolio 💥 CEX Listings Upcoming (MEXC, BITMART, GATE.IO, XT.COM & LBANK) 🤙 Partnership with Top KOLs on IG, TG & YT with over 1M+ Followers Combined
